data.name: TheSkyXClientScript_Initialize
TheSkyXScript_GetBinList
TheSkyXScript_GetFilterList
TheSkyXScript_GetImageLinkResults
data.value:
var result; var objResult = { errorCode : ImageLinkResults.errorCode, succeeded : ImageLinkResults.succeeded == 1, searchAborted : ImageLinkResults.searchAborted == 1, errorText : ImageLinkResults.errorText, imageScale : ImageLinkResults.imageScale, imagePositionAngle : ImageLinkResults.imagePositionAngle, imageCenterRAJ2000 : ImageLinkResults.imageCenterRAJ2000, imageCenterDecJ2000 : ImageLinkResults.imageCenterDecJ2000, imageSize : { width: ImageLinkResults.imageWidthInPixels, height : ImageLinkResults.imageHeightInPixels }, imageIsMirrored : ImageLinkResults.imageIsMirrored == 1, imageFilePath : ImageLinkResults.imageFilePath, imageStarCount : ImageLinkResults.imageStarCount, imageFWHMInArcSeconds : ImageLinkResults.imageFWHMInArcSeconds, solutionRMS : ImageLinkResults.solutionRMS, solutionRMSX : ImageLinkResults.solutionRMSX, solutionRMSY : ImageLinkResults.solutionRMSY, solutionStarCount : ImageLinkResults.solutionStarCount, catalogStarCount : ImageLinkResults.catalogStarCount };
result = JSON.stringify(objResult);

data.name: TheSkyXScript_GetObservatoryInformation
TheSkyXScript_GetSelectedHardware
TheSkyXScript_StarChartClickFindXY
TheSkyXScript_StarChartFindByName
TheSkyXScript_TakeImageStatus
